behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction specifies three requirements (Native platform SAM conversion support, type remapping of overriddenFunctionSymbol, composer parameter addition for rich function references), and tests cover all three via the corresponding test functions for each lowering pass.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with clear docstrings, grouped by component (fun_interface_lowering, type_remapper, composer_param), and include section comments separating pass-to-pass tests from functional tests.
